ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the film */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget of the film (if available) */,
  "running_time" TEXT /* Running time of the film (if available) */,
  "domestic_gross" TEXT /* Domestic gross revenue of the film */,
  "theaters" INTEGER /* Number of theaters in which the film was released */,
  "total_gross" TEXT /* Total gross revenue of the film */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of the film's release */,
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the distributor of the film */,
  "is_estimated" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the budget and running time are estimated */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the film */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the film */,
  "cast" TEXT /* Main cast of the film */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average user rating of the film */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief summary of the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_distributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("distributor_id") REFERENCES distributors ("distributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "sub_genre" TEXT /* Sub-genre (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distributors" (
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distributor */,
  "distributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the distributor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the distributor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the distributor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the distributor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the distributor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "theaters" (
  "theater_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theater */,
  "theater_name" TEXT /* Name of the theater */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the theater */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the theater in terms of seating */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the theater */,
  "screen_count" INTEGER /* Number of screens in the theater */,
  "screen_type" TEXT /* Type of screens (e.g., 2D, 3D, IMAX) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_theater_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "theater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theater */,
  "show_dates" TEXT /* Dates the film was shown in the theater (e.g., '2017-12-15 to 2018-01-15') */,
  "show_times" TEXT /* Show times of the film in the theater (e.g., '10:00 AM, 1:00 PM, 4:00 PM') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_theater_mapping_theater_id FOREIGN KEY ("theater_id") REFERENCES theaters ("theater_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_theater_mapping_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., executive, analyst, theater manager) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the film data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the film data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_channel" TEXT /* Channel of access (e.g., web, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "domestic_gross" TEXT /* Domestic gross revenue of the film */,
  "international_gross" TEXT /* International gross revenue of the film */,
  "total_gross" TEXT /* Total gross revenue of the film */,
  "production_cost" TEXT /* Production cost of the film */,
  "marketing_cost" TEXT /* Marketing cost of the film */,
  "profit" TEXT /* Profit of the film */,
  "budget_allocation" TEXT /* Breakdown of budget allocation (e.g., production, marketing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_financials_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the film */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1 to 5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Review text provided by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the rating helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_ratings_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category in which the film was nominated or won */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the award */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result (e.g., 'Won', 'Nominated') */,
  "nominees" TEXT /* List of nominees (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_awards_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_crew" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member (e.g., director, producer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the crew member (e.g., production, sound) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_crew_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_studios" (
  "studio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each studio */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "studio_name" TEXT /* Name of the studio */,
  "studio_role" TEXT /* Role of the studio (e.g., production, distribution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("studio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_studios_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., action, comedy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_tags_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., poster, backdrop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_images_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)
